title: 8Pcs Vacuum Storage Bags with USB Electric Pump Rapid Compression Seal Bag Quilts Blankets Clothes Travel Luggage Storage
detail_text: Features: Powerful and Efficient : Equipped with a high performance cordless electric pump delivering 4000Pa strong suction and 140L/min airflow . Compress a single bag in just 10-15 seconds , far more efficient than manual pumps . No more repetitive pressing or rolling , completely freeing your hands from fatigue and soreness USB Rechargeable and Cordless : The electric pump features a rechargeable battery and charges via a universal USB port . It supports various power sources including power banks , laptops , and car chargers . The cordless design allows use anywhere , by the wardrobe , in front of your suitcase , or in hotel rooms , making it the perfect companion for global travelers . Enduring and Leak Proof : Made from thickened PA+PE composite material , the bags are tear resistant , puncture resistant , and built to last . The unique triple seal valve combined with a double zipper lock ensures absolute airtightness , effectively preventing air leakage . Your valuable clothing such as down jackets and sweaters receive months of protection against moisture , dust , and mildew . The transparent design allows easy identification of contents Travel Essential , Space Saver : Designed specifically for travelers ! Place these compression bags in your backpack or carry on to instantly free up to 50% of valuable space . Pack more clothes while keeping your luggage neat and organized , a smart choice to avoid airline overweight fees and enjoy longer trips . Perfect for business travel , weekend getaways , or cruise vacations Specification : Compression Bags: Material : PA + PE Size: 16 x 24 inches / 40 x 60 cm Color: Clear Pump: Material : ABS Battery Capacity: 1500 mAh Size: 5.5 inches / 14 cm Color: White Air Pressure: ≤ 6000 Pa Package includes： 1 x Electric Air Pump (with charging cable) 8 x Compression Bags 8 x Sealing Clips

detail_html:
Follow our shop and keep getting our new products and discounts~

(Tips: Everyone follow us can get a spend coupon!)

Do you still worry about having too many quilts to save space or store? Look, this product solves the problem easily

Product highlights

Ultimate protection for bedding, sweaters, seasonal clothing and travel

An airtight/watertight seal prevents mildew, moisture, musty smell, moths, dust or dust when stored.

Easy to use, any household vacuum cleaner can remove air with a hose

Ultimate protection

The outstanding features of this bag are scratch - free and water - free. If you accidentally scrape a small mouth, you can use wide double-sided tape to tape the two sides together.

Do not screw off the damper, screw loose, there is a circular gasket, do not take it off! !

Product Description:

Material: PA+PE plastic

Product size:

▫️: 40cm (L) x 60cm (W)

(Suitable for storing 3-4 sweaters/pillows/thin comforters/winter coats/cotton coats, etc.)

▫️: 50 cm (L) x 70 cm (W)

(Suitable for storing 4-5 sweaters /10 T-shirts /4 coats/pillows/winter coats/cotton coats, etc.)

▫️: 60cm (L) x 80cm (W)

(Suitable for blankets, pillows, winter coats, etc.)

▫️: 70cm (L) x 100cm (W)

(Suitable for quilts etc.)

Feature:

Item Name: Liquid Cosmetic Bags

Material: PET

Capacity: 30ml 50ml 100ml

Features: Good Sealing Pocket Size Anti-drop

Size Details:

30ml Bags Size: 10.5cm x 8cm/4.13- x 3.15- (Approx.)

50ml Bags Size: 13.5cm x 8cm/5.31- x 3.15- (Approx.)

100ml Bags Size: 15.5cm x 9cm/6.1- x 3.54- (Approx.)

Notes:

Due to the light and screen setting difference the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures.

Please allow slight dimension difference due to different manual measurement.

-------------------⚠️ Pay attention ⚠️------------------

* Due to manual measurement, please allow a deviation of 1-3cm.

* If you are a first time buyer, select "Hand Pump" and add it to your cart.

* Please do not open the package with a sharp knife to avoid damage.

* Make sure anything you store is thoroughly dry.

* It is recommended to leave about 3 inches /9cm of space between the item and the zipper to allow the bag to seal better

* It is recommended to leave about 3 inches /9cm of space between the item and the zipper to allow the bag to seal better

aiTexts: This Vacuum Compression Storage Bag efficiently reduces the volume of clothes and quilts for easy packing and storage.
No pump needed—simply seal the bag and compress manually to save space, ideal for student dormitories and home organization.
Durable, reusable material ensures long-term use and protection against dust and moisture.
Perfect for moving, seasonal storage, or decluttering, maximizing closet or luggage space with convenience.

page_json.name: Vacuum Compressed Storage Bags
page_json.description: Vacuum Compression Storage Bag for Clothes And Quilts Moving Packing Bag No Need to Pump Air out Ideal for Dormitory And Home Use

title: No-Pumping Travel Vacuum Compression Bag Quick Air Seal Vacuum Storage Bag No Need Pump for Clothes and cotton quilt
detail_text: Main Features [Space Saving] Dedicated for keeping duvet, bed sheets, towels, blankets, winter coats, jackets, dresses, gowns whether long or short. This is a great space-saving idea for packing bulky season clothes and adding more storage space to your closet. [Lasting Airtightness] The unique zip seal and nonreturn valve which ensures no air gets back in. You can identify the garment bags are sealed well or not by eyes. [Quick Air Out] Centrifugal suspension valve, exhaust faster. When discharging, the air in the bag will push out the air valve and exhaust quickly outward. When sealing, atmospheric pressure squeezes the air valve inward, and the air valve tightly seals the air out [Transparent Front] The visible transparent front design, convenient for knowing what you were put in the bag, help you find what you want in seconds. [Reusable & Durable] Our space bags are made of premium PA + PE material, softer than other space saver bags on the market, and can be reused multiple times. They are perfect for long-term storage, keep clothes from mold, mildew, dirt, insects, and odors. [Easy Compression] The valve is in the middle of the vacuum bags, which is easier to operate than on the top of the bag. It also fits for all kinds of the household vacuum cleaner. SIZE: 【S】70x50x32cm 【L】80x56x32cm 【XL】100x70x32cm 【XXL】100x80x32cm
detail_html:
Main Features

[Space Saving] Dedicated for keeping duvet, bed sheets, towels, blankets, winter coats, jackets, dresses, gowns whether long or short. This is a great space-saving idea for packing bulky season clothes and adding more storage space to your closet.

[Lasting Airtightness] The unique zip seal and nonreturn valve which ensures no air gets back in. You can identify the garment bags are sealed well or not by eyes.

[Quick Air Out] Centrifugal suspension valve, exhaust faster. When discharging, the air in the bag will push out the air valve and exhaust quickly outward. When sealing, atmospheric pressure squeezes the air valve inward, and the air valve tightly seals the air out

[Transparent Front] The visible transparent front design, convenient for knowing what you were put in the bag, help you find what you want in seconds.

[Reusable & Durable] Our space bags are made of premium PA + PE material, softer than other space saver bags on the market, and can be reused multiple times. They are perfect for long-term storage, keep clothes from mold, mildew, dirt, insects, and odors.

[Easy Compression] The valve is in the middle of the vacuum bags, which is easier to operate than on the top of the bag. It also fits for all kinds of the household vacuum cleaner.

SIZE:

【S】70x50x32cm

【L】80x56x32cm

【XL】100x70x32cm

【XXL】100x80x32cm

title: 5PCS Vacuum Storage Bags Space Saver Bag Compression Seal Bags for Clothing Comforters Blankets Bedding Organizer Travel Storage
detail_text: About this item Create Space for Storage: Store away your comforters, blankets, duvets, towels, clothes, pillows, plush toys, linens, bedding, and more. These bags are essential for room organization and maximizing suitcase space, transforming cluttered areas into tidy, spacious zones. Long-term Protection: Our vacuum seal bags made of rip-resistant PA+PE material with the triple-seal turbo valve & double-zip seal design, providing lasting airtight protection to keep your items safe from dust, dirt, and other damage. Easy to Use: Put the items in, zip it up and suck out the air, then close the lid and finish; Works with any standard vacuum cleaner. 4-Size Type Vacuum Storage Bags: There are 4 size bags to choose, A must-have to covering your storage needs, allows you to safely store a large amount of your different sizes out-of-season clothing or bedding in your linen closet or underbed. Essential for Travel and Home: These Vacuum sealed bags are fit for home storing and travel luggage organizing, ideal for moving, freeing up space in your closet, cloakroom, wardrobe, basement, suitcase, dormitory, attic and bedroom. Package Include 1/5PCS x Vacuum Storage Bags
detail_html:
About this item

Create Space for Storage: Store away your comforters, blankets, duvets, towels, clothes, pillows, plush toys, linens, bedding, and more. These bags are essential for room organization and maximizing suitcase space, transforming cluttered areas into tidy, spacious zones.

Long-term Protection: Our vacuum seal bags made of rip-resistant PA+PE material with the triple-seal turbo valve & double-zip seal design, providing lasting airtight protection to keep your items safe from dust, dirt, and other damage.

Easy to Use: Put the items in, zip it up and suck out the air, then close the lid and finish; Works with any standard vacuum cleaner.

4-Size Type Vacuum Storage Bags: There are 4 size bags to choose, A must-have to covering your storage needs, allows you to safely store a large amount of your different sizes out-of-season clothing or bedding in your linen closet or underbed.

Essential for Travel and Home: These Vacuum sealed bags are fit for home storing and travel luggage organizing, ideal for moving, freeing up space in your closet, cloakroom, wardrobe, basement, suitcase, dormitory, attic and bedroom.


Package Include

1/5PCS x Vacuum Storage Bags

These bags are essential for room organization and maximizing suitcase space, transforming cluttered areas into tidy, spacious zones. Long-term Protection: Our vacuum seal bags made of rip-resistant PA+PE material with the triple-seal turbo valve & double-zip seal design, providing lasting airtight protection to keep your items safe from dust, dirt, and other damage. Easy to Use: Put the items in, zip it up and suck out the air, then close the lid and finish; Works with any standard vacuum cleaner. 4-Size Type Vacuum Storage Bags: There are 4 size bags to choose, A must-have to covering your storage needs, allows you to safely store a large amount of your different sizes out-of-season clothing or bedding in your linen closet or underbed. Essential for Travel and Home: These Vacuum sealed bags are fit for home storing and travel luggage organizing, ideal for moving, freeing up space in your closet, cloakroom, wardrobe, basement, suitcase, dormitory, attic and bedroom. Package Include 1/5PCS x Vacuum Storage Bags

product.desc:
About this item

Create Space for Storage: Store away your comforters, blankets, duvets, towels, clothes, pillows, plush toys, linens, bedding, and more. These bags are essential for room organization and maximizing suitcase space, transforming cluttered areas into tidy, spacious zones.

Long-term Protection: Our vacuum seal bags made of rip-resistant PA+PE material with the triple-seal turbo valve & double-zip seal design, providing lasting airtight protection to keep your items safe from dust, dirt, and other damage.

Easy to Use: Put the items in, zip it up and suck out the air, then close the lid and finish; Works with any standard vacuum cleaner.

4-Size Type Vacuum Storage Bags: There are 4 size bags to choose, A must-have to covering your storage needs, allows you to safely store a large amount of your different sizes out-of-season clothing or bedding in your linen closet or underbed.

Essential for Travel and Home: These Vacuum sealed bags are fit for home storing and travel luggage organizing, ideal for moving, freeing up space in your closet, cloakroom, wardrobe, basement, suitcase, dormitory, attic and bedroom.


Package Include

1/5PCS x Vacuum Storage Bags

detail_html:
Material : TPU+Nylon

Type: Vacuum Bags for Travel

[Excellent durability and lifetime warranty] This travel vacuum bag can be reused 1,000 times through a composite of polyester and TPU and closed zippers. The entire product is covered by a lifetime warranty for the entire life of the zipper (1000 times).

· 【 Maximize luggage space 】 Travel space saving Bag Cube design reduces gap waste between raised vacuum bags. Not only does it maximize the utilization of luggage space, but it also leaves an organized space for other travel essentials.

· [Suitable for multiple scenarios] The suspension system and durable water resistance make these compression bags suitable for travel in a variety of environments. Challenging outdoor activities such as hiking, camping, kayaking, boating, and limited living space such as cruises, backpacking, RV trips, etc.

Note: Please measure your size before purchasing,thanks!

Please do not use sharp tools such as knives and scissors to open the package, so as not to Cut through the vacuum bag!

aiTexts: These reusable vacuum compression bags are made from durable TPU and nylon, designed to be used up to 1,000 times with strong, leak-proof zippers.
The cube-shaped bags maximize luggage space by minimizing gaps for better organization during travel.
Water-resistant and equipped with a suspension system, they suit diverse travel scenarios including hiking, camping, boating, backpacking, and RV trips.
Measure your luggage and bags carefully before purchase to ensure the perfect fit.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
Material : TPU+Nylon

Type: Vacuum Bags for Travel

[Excellent durability and lifetime warranty] This travel vacuum bag can be reused 1,000 times through a composite of polyester and TPU and closed zippers. The entire product is covered by a lifetime warranty for the entire life of the zipper (1000 times).

· 【 Maximize luggage space 】 Travel space saving Bag Cube design reduces gap waste between raised vacuum bags. Not only does it maximize the utilization of luggage space, but it also leaves an organized space for other travel essentials.

· [Suitable for multiple scenarios] The suspension system and durable water resistance make these compression bags suitable for travel in a variety of environments. Challenging outdoor activities such as hiking, camping, kayaking, boating, and limited living space such as cruises, backpacking, RV trips, etc.

Note: Please measure your size before purchasing,thanks!

Please do not use sharp tools such as knives and scissors to open the package, so as not to Cut through the vacuum bag!


if you need other color , please check in my store.

· [100% Satisfaction Guarantee] : Our Satisfaction Guarantee ensures that you are completely satisfied with your purchase. If you are not satisfied with the space-saving bag, please contact us and we will replace it immediately or refund it. Your satisfaction is our top priority!

Note: Before you buy, please refer to the size to make sure it fits yours

detail_html:
• Compact Size : Its compact size makes it perfect for storing in drawers, closets, or under beds, maximizing space utilization.






• Easy to Use : With its user-friendly design, this bag can be easily sealed without the need for a pump, making it convenient for home use.






• Seasonal Storage : Ideal for seasonal storage, this bag helps keep your belongings organized and accessible throughout the year.






• Self-exhaust Stereo Bag : This non-pumping self-exhaust stereo bag is designed for easy vacuum sealing, saving space in your home.






• Thickened Vacuum Clothes Quilt : The thickened vacuum clothes quilt feature ensures your garments and quilts remain fresh and dust-free.

detail_text: Specialized Storage Bag This vacuum compression bag is specifically designed for storing clothes, down jackets, and other household items, ensuring they remain organized and easily accessible. product.desc:
Specialized Storage Bag



This vacuum compression bag is specifically designed for storing clothes, down jackets, and other household items, ensuring they remain organized and easily accessible.






Air Extraction



The air extraction function of the bag allows for efficient compression, reducing the size of your items and maximizing storage space.






Durable Material



Made from durable material, this storage bag is built to last, providing long-term use and reliable protection for your belongings.






Sealed Design



The sealed design of the bag prevents dust and moisture from entering, keeping your belongings clean and dry.






Hanging Feature



Equipped with a hanging feature, this storage bag allows for easy hanging and space-saving storage in your closet or drawer.

page_json.name: LUOCHENG | Dust-proof Hanging Vacuum Compression Bags for Clothes Down Jackets
page_json.description: <html> <head></head> <body>  Specialized Storage Bag   This vacuum compression bag is specifically designed for storing clothes, down jackets, and other household items, ensuring they remain organized and easily accessible.    Air Extraction   The air extraction function of the bag allows for efficient compression, reducing the size of your items and maximizing storage space.    Durable Material   Made from durable material, this storage bag is built to last, providing long-term use and reliable protection for your belongings.    Sealed Design   The sealed design of the bag prevents dust and moisture from entering, keeping your belongings clean and dry.    Hanging Feature   Equipped with a hanging feature, this storage bag allows for easy hanging and space-saving storage in your closet or drawer.     </body></html>

title: Travel Compression Bag down Jacket Clothes Moving Packing Organizer Polyester Breathable Closet Bedroom Storage for Clothes
detail_text: Polyester Material Crafted from high-quality polyester, this down jacket offers durability and comfort for everyday wear. Versatile Use Ideal for organizing clothes in your wardrobe or compressing them for travel, this jacket serves multiple purposes. title: Durable Vacuum Storage Bags, Space Saver Sealer Compression Bags for Blankets, Comforters, Pillows, Clothes Storage
detail_text: Transparent bag, you can clearly see where your things are placed It is easy to be clear, and the stains accidentally obtained can be rinsed with water The different sizes in the vacuum bag set from 40 x 60 cm over 80 x 100 to 90 x 110 cm with small and large vacuum bags cover your need for travel, hanging storage, warehousing and storing of your clothes. Suitable for Bed linen, duvets, bedding, your clothes, suits, carry-on luggage when travelling or in a suitcase. Hanging with hook or lying down. Your textiles and laundry items are always well stored in our airtight bags. From XS to XXL laundry bags everything is stored and can be put back into use at any time thanks to the transparent bags. Buy our tried and tested and proven quality For Hand Roll type bag (35*50CM, 40*60CM, 50*70Cm), is suitable for Traveling,Camping or other outdoor use . For long term use at home, better to choose normal vacuum bag with pump .
